creator: aehlig@linta.de
text:
Created attachment 177702
Shar of a draft port for bazel for version 0.4.2rc2

Thanks for running the test builds.
For 11 (and probably 12 as well) the fix is already upstream (https://github.com/bazelbuild/bazel/commit/b3dc4cc13cd99f919075c36547a00a5475daed7a) and I updated the shar accordingly. For 9 I still have to investigate. I will report back, once I found out what is wrong there.
